name: Carne Adovada (Marinated Pork)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the pork with salt.
2. Add garlic and oregano to the blended chili.
3. Pour the chili mixture over the meat.
4. Marinate in the refrigerator for 6-8 hours or overnight.
5. Cook slowly on top of the stove or in an oven set to 350°F until the meat is done, about 1 hour.
6. Optionally, marinate thick slices of potatoes with the meat.
